intent.content: The speed change between two temporally close contexts of the same vehicle is bounded.
intent.goal: Detect abrupt and physically implausible speed changes within a short time window for the same vehicle.
intent.design_rationale: A vehicle cannot instantaneously change its speed beyond physical acceleration limits; large speed differences between two records with close timestamps of the same taxi indicate measurement errors or GPS noise.

semantics: For any two contexts v1 and v2, if they belong to the same vehicle and their timestamps are close (absolute time difference within a certain range), then the absolute speed difference between v1 and v2 does not exceed a certain bound.
